title: Caspase 3/7 Activity
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5c1f","text":"The Caspase-Glo 3/7 Assay is a homogeneous, luminescent assay that measures caspase-3 and -7 activities. The assay provides a luminogenic caspase-3/7 substrate, which contains the tetrapeptide sequence DEVD, in a reagent optimized for caspase activity, luciferase activity and cell lysis. Luminescence is proportional to the amount of caspase activity present. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start:
{"blocks":[{"key":"cm5nm","text":"The Caspase Glo 3/7 Assay was acquired from Promega (Madison, USA).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"asns3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f8psp","text":"1. Equilibrate the Caspase-Glo‱ 3/7 Buffer and lyophilized Caspase-Glo‱ 3/7 Substrate to room temperature before use.
2. Transfer the contents of the Caspase-Glo‱ 3/7 Buffer bottle into the amber bottle containing Caspase-Glo‱ 3/7
Substrate. Mix by swirling or inverting the contents until the substrate is thoroughly dissolved to form the
Caspase-Glo‱ 3/7 Reagent. 
Storage: The reconstituted Caspase-Glo‱ 3/7 Reagent may be stored at 4°C for up to 3 days with no loss of activity compared to that of freshly prepared reagent. Reconstituted reagent stored at 4°C for 1 week will give a signal approximately 90% of that obtained with freshly prepared reagent, while reconstituted reagent stored at 4°C for 4 weeks will give a signal approximately 75% of that obtained with freshly prepared reagent. Reconstituted reagent that has been refrozen and stored at –20°C for 1 week will give a signal approximately 75% of that of freshly prepared reagent, and refrozen reagent stored at –20°C for 4 weeks will give a signal approximately 60% of that of freshly prepared reagent.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":30,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":70,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":161,"length":1},{"key":3,"offset":225,"length":1},{"key":4,"offset":351,"length":1},{"key":5,"offset":405,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"95C430180EED11F0A6470A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"95C430500EED11F0A6470A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"2":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"95C430850EED11F0A6470A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"3":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"95C430B90EED11F0A6470A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"4":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"95C430F80EED11F0A6470A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"5":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"95C4312C0EED11F0A6470A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"a8njr","text":"• multichannel pipette or automated pipetting station\n• plate shaker for mixing multiwell plates\n• luminometer capable of reading multiwell plates","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Equilibrate the Caspase-Glo 3/7 Buffer and lyophilized Caspase-Glo 3/7 Substrate to room temperature before use.

Transfer the contents of the Caspase-Glo 3/7 Buffer bottle into the amber bottle containing Caspase-Glo 3/7 Substrate. Mix by swirling or inverting the contents until the substrate is thoroughly dissolved to form the Caspase-Glo 3/7 Reagent.
Prepare and mix all reagents thoroughly before use according to instructions. Each unknown sample should be assayed in duplicate or triplicate.
Remove the media from all wells and discard.
Mix 1:1 ratio Caspase-Glo 3/7 Reagent volume to medium and add 100µL of the mix in each well. Incubate for 3h at 37 o C in the incubator.
Measure the luminescence of each sample in a plate-reading luminometer as directed by the luminometermanufacturer.
Total protein concentrations was measured by Qubit Protein Assay Kit (ThermoFisher, Massachusetts USA ) using the Qubit 4 Fluorometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Massachusetts USA).
Normalize Caspase 3/7 enzymatic activity to total protein concentrations.
creator: Karyna Tarasova
